blended.narrative: Sugarbush is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours. The 14-day outlook shows 9 inches total. Mild temps with highs near 47°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Thursday: 2.1" of snow, highs of 57°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Sunday: 2.5" of snow, highs of 29°F. Expect variable conditions.
